mapper.select:
SELECT b.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, b.WRITER_ID AS writerId, b.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, b.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, b.BOARD_THUMB AS boardThumb, TO_CHAR(b.BOARD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS boardDate, b.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, m.MEMBER_THUMB AS memberThumb, b.BOARD_STATUS AS boardStatus, b.BOARD_LAT AS boardLat, b.BOARD_LNG AS boardLng, b.READ_COUNT AS readCount, b.ADDR AS addr, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE_TBL l WHERE l.BOARD_NO = b.BOARD_NO), 0) AS likeCount,
b.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS writerNickname, TO_CHAR(b.BOARD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDate,
TO_CHAR(b.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updatedAt, b.BOARD_THUMB AS thumbnailUrl, 0 AS commentCount FROM BOARD_TBL b LEFT JOIN MEMBER_TBL m ON b.WRITER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID WHERE BOARD_STATUS = #{status} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STORE_BOARD_TBL s WHERE s.BOARD_NO = b.BOARD_NO )
AND b.ctpv = #{sido}
AND b.sgg = #{sigungu}
AND BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND MEMBER_NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY (b.READ_COUNT + NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE_TBL l WHERE l.BOARD_NO = b.BOARD_NO), 0)) DESC
ORDER BY b.BOARD_DATE DESC, b.BOARD_NO DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_TBL ( BOARD_NO, WRITER_ID, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_THUMB, MEMBER_NICKNAME, BOARD_STATUS, BOARD_LAT, BOARD_LNG, CTPV, SGG, ADDR ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{writerId}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardThumb}, #{memberNickname}, #{boardStatus}, #{boardLat}, #{boardLng}, #{ctpv}, #{sgg}, #{addr} )
mapper.select: select ctpvsgg_id from ctpvsgg_tbl where ctpv_nm = #{ctpv} and sgg_nm = #{sgg}
select board_seq.nextval from dual
select member_co2 from member_tbl1 where member_id = #{memberId}

select sum(a.carbon_road_tco2+b.carbon_ele_tot+c.carbon_gas_tot+d.carbon_heat_tot)/4/30.5 from carbon_tbl a left join carbon_ele_tbl b on (a.ctpvsgg_id = b.ctpvsgg_id) left join carbon_gas_tbl c on (b.ctpvsgg_id = c.ctpvsgg_id) left join carbon_heat_tbl d on (c.ctpvsgg_id = d.ctpvsgg_id) where a.ctpvsgg_id = #{ctpvsggId} and b.ctpvsgg_id = #{ctpvsggId} and c.ctpvsgg_id = #{ctpvsggId} and d.ctpvsgg_id = #{ctpvsggId} group by a.carbon_road_tco2, b.carbon_ele_tot, c.carbon_gas_tot, d.carbon_heat_tot
mapper.update: update member_tbl1 set member_co2 = #{membercalco2} where member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE BOARD_TBL SET BOARD_TITLE = #{boardTitle}, BOARD_CONTENT = #{boardContent}, BOARD_THUMB = #{boardThumb}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE, ADDR = #{addr} WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT BOARD_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_FILE_TBL ( FILE_NO, BOARD_NO, MEMBER_ID, BOARD_FILE_NAME, BOARD_FILE_PATH ) VALUES ( #{fileNo}, #{boardNo}, #{memberId}, #{boardFileName}, #{boardFilePath} )
mapper.select: SELECT C.BOARD_COMMENT_NO AS commentNo, C.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, C.BOARD_COMMENT_WRITER AS memberId, C.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, M.MEMBER_THUMB AS memberThumb, C.BOARD_COMMENT_CONTENT AS content, TO_CHAR(C.BOARD_COMMENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(C.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt, C.PARENT_COMMENT_NO AS parentCommentNo, C.COMMENT_GROUP AS commentGroup, C.COMMENT_DEPTH AS commentDepth, CASE WHEN C.IS_SECRET = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isSecret, C.BOARD_COMMENT_STATUS as boardCommentStatus FROM BOARD_COMMENT_TBL C LEFT JOIN MEMBER_TBL M ON C.BOARD_COMMENT_WRITER = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE C.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} ORDER BY C.COMMENT_GROUP ASC, C.COMMENT_DEPTH ASC, C.BOARD_COMMENT_NO ASC

SELECT BOARD_COMMENT_NO AS commentNo, BOARD_NO AS boardNo, BOARD_COMMENT_WRITER AS memberId, MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, BOARD_COMMENT_CONTENT AS content, PARENT_COMMENT_NO AS parentCommentNo, COMMENT_GROUP AS commentGroup, COMMENT_DEPTH AS commentDepth, CASE WHEN IS_SECRET = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isSecret FROM BOARD_COMMENT_TBL WHERE BOARD_COMMENT_NO = #{commentNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD_COMMENT_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_COMMENT_TBL ( BOARD_COMMENT_NO, BOARD_COMMENT_WRITER, BOARD_NO, BOARD_COMMENT_CONTENT, BOARD_COMMENT_DATE, UPDATED_AT, MEMBER_NICKNAME, PARENT_COMMENT_NO, COMMENT_GROUP, COMMENT_DEPTH, IS_SECRET ) VALUES ( #{commentNo}, #{memberId}, #{boardNo}, #{content}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{memberNickname}, #{parentCommentNo}, NVL((SELECT COMMENT_GROUP FROM BOARD_COMMENT_TBL WHERE BOARD_COMMENT_NO = #{parentCommentNo}), #{commentNo}), NVL((SELECT COMMENT_DEPTH + 1 FROM BOARD_COMMENT_TBL WHERE BOARD_COMMENT_NO = #{parentCommentNo}), 1), CASE WHEN #{isSecret} = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END )
mapper.select: SELECT b.board_no AS boardNo, COUNT(t.board_no) AS count, b.board_title AS boardTitle, b.ctpv, b.sgg FROM board_tbl b LEFT JOIN board_like_tbl t ON (t.board_no = b.board_no) WHERE b.board_status = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM store_board_tbl s WHERE s.board_no = b.board_no ) GROUP BY b.board_no, b.board_title, b.ctpv, b.sgg ORDER BY count DESC offset 0 rows fetch next 10 rows only

SELECT board_no, writer_id, member_nickname, board_title, board_thumb, board_date, read_count FROM board_tbl
writer_id = #{memberId}
board_no in
#{boardNo}
board_no in
#{boardNo}
and board_title LIKE '%' || #{searchBoard} || '%'
ORDER BY board_no DESC
ORDER BY board_no ASC
ORDER BY read_count ASC
ORDER BY read_count DESC
select board_no from board_like_tbl where member_id = #{memberId}
-- 이 회원이 스크랩한 게시글 번호 목록을 가져오는 기능임 select board_no from tip_tbl where member_id=#{memberId}

SELECT b.board_no AS boardNo, b.writer_id AS writerId, b.member_nickname AS memberNickname, b.member_nickname AS writerNickname, b.board_title AS boardTitle, b.board_thumb AS boardThumb, b.board_date AS boardDate, b.read_count AS readCount FROM board_tbl b WHERE b.board_status = 0 AND b.board_no IN ( SELECT board_no FROM tip_tbl GROUP BY board_no HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ) ORDER BY ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tip_tbl t WHERE t.board_no = b.board_no ) DESC, b.board_date DESC
-- 이 회원이 이 게시글을 스크랩했는지 확인하는 기능임 select count(*) from tip_tbl where board_no = #{boardNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: -- 스크랩 삭제 기능임. 이 회원의 스크랩 기록을 지움 delete from tip_tbl where board_no = #{boardNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_MISSION_TBL WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MISSION_NO = ( SELECT MISSION_NO FROM MISSION_TBL WHERE MISSION_TYPE = 'BASIC' ) AND TRUNC(CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_MISSION_TBL ( MEMBER_MISSION_NO, MEMBER_ID, MISSION_NO, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( MEMBER_MISSION_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, (SELECT MISSION_NO FROM MISSION_TBL WHERE MISSION_TYPE = 'BASIC'), SYSDATE )
mapper.select: select b.board_no, b.board_title, b.board_content, m.member_thumb, b.member_nickname, b.board_status, b.board_lat, b.board_lng, b.ctpv, b.sgg, b.addr, c.ctpvsgg_id, c.sgg_nm, COUNT(b.board_no) AS board_count, count(l.board_no) as like_count from board_tbl b left join member_tbl1 m on (b.member_nickname = m.member_nickname) left join ctpvsgg_tbl c on (b.ctpv = c.ctpv_nm AND c.sgg_nm = b.sgg) left join board_tbl b2 on (b.ctpv = b2.ctpv and b.sgg = b2.sgg) left join board_like_tbl l on (b.board_no = l.board_no) where b.board_status = 0 and b.addr is not null or b.board_no = b2.board_no or l.board_no = l.board_no group by b.board_no, b.board_title, b.board_content, m.member_thumb, b.member_nickname, b.board_status, b.board_lat, b.board_lng, b.ctpv, b.sgg, b.addr, b.addr, c.ctpvsgg_id, c.sgg_nm, l.board_no order by b.board_lat desc

SELECT ctpv, sgg, SUM(board_count) AS board_count FROM ( SELECT b.ctpv AS ctpv, b.sgg AS sgg, COUNT(b.board_no) AS board_count FROM board_tbl b GROUP BY b.ctpv, b.sgg UNION ALL SELECT r.ctpv_nm AS ctpv, r.sgg_nm AS sgg, COUNT(s.market_no) AS board_count FROM store_board_tbl s JOIN ctpvsgg_tbl r ON s.ctpvsgg_id = r.ctpvsgg_id WHERE s.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY r.ctpv_nm, r.sgg_nm ) GROUP BY ctpv, sgg
mapper.insert: insert into report_tbl values ( report_seq.nextval, #{targetNo}, #{targetType}, #{memberId}, #{reportCategory}, #{reportContent}, sysdate, 0 )
mapper.select: select count(*) from report_tbl where report_no = #{reportNo} and member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT b.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, b.WRITER_ID AS writerId, b.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, b.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, b.BOARD_THUMB AS boardThumb, TO_CHAR(b.BOARD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS boardDate, b.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, b.BOARD_STATUS AS boardStatus, b.BOARD_LAT AS boardLat, b.BOARD_LNG AS boardLng, b.READ_COUNT AS readCount, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE_TBL l WHERE l.BOARD_NO = b.BOARD_NO), 0) AS likeCount, b.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS writerNickname, TO_CHAR(b.BOARD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDate, TO_CHAR(b.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updatedAt, b.BOARD_THUMB AS thumbnailUrl, (select count(*) from board_comment_tbl c where c.board_no = b.board_no) as commentCount FROM BOARD_TBL b WHERE b.board_no = #{boardNo} AND b.board_status = 0

select r.report_no, r.target_no, r.target_type, r.report_category, r.report_content, r.report_date, r.report_status, (select count(*) from report_tbl where target_no = r.target_no and target_type = r.target_type) as reportCount, case when r.target_type = 'board' then b.writer_id when r.target_type = 'comment' then c.board_comment_writer end as targetId,
case when r.target_type = 'board' then r.target_no when r.target_type = 'comment' then c.board_no end as boardNo from report_tbl r left join board_tbl b on r.target_no = b.board_no and r.target_type = 'board' left join board_comment_tbl c on r.target_no = c.board_comment_no and r.target_type = 'comment' where target_no = #{targetNo} and target_type = #{targetType} and report_no != #{reportNo}
